name: Fluffy Gold Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the dry ingredients in a mixing bowl.
2. Add the shortening and half the milk, mix until combined.
3. Gradually add the remaining milk, vanilla extract, and egg yolks. Blend well.
4. Pour the batter into 2 greased and floured round layer pans.
5. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 30-35 minutes.
